Draw case: becomes live if the first 30 minutes stay low-event and both sides protect transition space.
watch_triggers: confirmed starting XI differs from roster-depth baseline
late injury or suspension changes the strongest positional unit
market probability moves against the model by more than 8 percentage points
market and fundamentals remain divergent close to kickoff

analysis_layers.title: Scoreline Distribution
analysis_layers.summary: Exact score is modeled as a distribution, not a single certainty. Top branches: 2-1 (30%), 2-0 (24%), 3-1 (24%).
counter_signals: Cards, penalties, set pieces, and chase-game states can move the total-goals branch quickly.
